entry.title: Re: No PO without PR

what are you looking for, authorization? The objects of interest would be:

F_REGU_BUK 

and

F_REGU_KOA

entry.title: Connecting SAP S/4hana system onpremise to Non SAP Systems using Integration suite

entry.title: Couldn't choose user status profile in Create Technical Object app
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I would like to assign user status profile and set the status manually in Create/Change technical object. But the field is read only even though I have given the "Maintenance planner" role. In addition, maybe related with this business catalog, EAM - Technical Object (SAP_EAM_BC_TO_MC). I couldn't also see this catalog as well in the system. Please guide me how I can define the status profile. Please kindly see the attachment also.

 

Thanks for your advice.

 

Best Regards,

Phoo

entry.title: Re: Requirement: Create an Email Alert if an Inbound EDI...
entry.content:
Thanks for sharing that information and link.

I will investigate that in more detail.

For now the requirement/ask is an automated alert, just so we know we have had an IDOC issue, in all cases we would then log on and manually fix the issue before the issue impacts on the Warehouses in the business (inbound delivery not created etc)

For context:

Recently our 3rd party Vendor submitted an EDI into our system which had Handling Units that had already been used 6 months ago.

It appears our Vendor had recycled their HU range which inturn caysed several IDOC fails in BD87 on our side.

Plan of action for us us to archive Handling Units after a month to avoid that happening again.

entry.title: Re: Total Business Volume RBVT getting summed at header l...
entry.content:
Hello Anna,

did you find a solution for this approach?

I had the same issue regarding the scale values and I created a customer specific condition ZRS1 which replaces RES1 in the pricing procedure for multiple clients. ZRS1 doesn't have the group condition features as RES1 and because of that the processing of the scale value works in my case.

I am also not happy with the presentation of the RBVT sum on the header level either. I could imagine that there might be a better way for this problem. But the approach with ZRS1 was the first thing that came to my mind.

Best regards,

Christoph

entry.title: Why is doing batch without stock while doing POGI?
entry.content:
Dear SD Expert

When I am going to do PGI then I want to do a batch search before that I checked the batch quantity in MMBE and found that there is a quantity in only 1 batch of 10,000 QTY. but while doing PGI all the batches of that material are created in all the batch searches showing PGI Transaction.

I require that while doing PGI only batch search is done. Only the stock batch will show and the batch that does not have stock will not show in the PGi search.

MMBE

VL01N

Thanks 

M.G Rabbani

entry.title: For what stand the hrtt-service?

The setup failes starting the application hrtt-service. About a solution i've already ask here

Here i'm looking for a explaination for what the prefix hrtt-* stand for, i can't found any about.
Can anyone please help me out?

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi, @David_Chaviano

 I'm really excited for the chance to join the Digital Skills initiative. I'm a creative who's interested in tech –  I have done the Google IT support certificatation, some AI courses but have no experience with SAP yet. This initative would be a great chance to explore, learn and get certifications that wouldn't be possible for me otherwise for now.

Looking forward to the invitation and learning process!

Sabine

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi,

I have been involved with SAP projects for a couple of decades as a business, but I would like to expand my technical skills in order to work as a SAP consultant. In order to make a mid-life job transition, I would really like to join this initiative, follow the learning path, and obtain my SAP certification.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hi everyone, greetings from Latvia!

I'm a creative with an interest in tech – I'm a web admin, have done Google IT support certification and taken some university and self-paced courses about AI and machine learning. I love to learn but apart from a bunch of Youtube videos, I don't have an experience with SAP, so I'm still in process of deciding if jumping into exploration of SAP was a dumb or a brave idea. 🙂

I'm starting to explore the community platform and learning resources, but if you have any suggestions on what courses or learning paths to start with for an enthusiastic newbie – I'm all ears!

Sabine

entry.title: Enclose Table entries in a TR
entry.content:
Hi,
I need to move all the entries of my Z*table in a TR in SAP DEv system & to other SAP QA system.
I happened to add the below in my TR Task attributes:

Table Contents R3TR TABU TDDAT
Table Contents R3TR TABU TVDIR
 I see the column Function and when i click on the key icon(Fig 1), what should i mention under the table keys icon(Fig 2)?

Are these enough to move my table contents to other system? Or is there any more i am missing?

entry.title: Sap S4 HANA to CRM on premise BUPA replication
entry.content:
Greetings everyone,

I established an integration between S4 and CRM systems. These are currently working properly. However, in the BUPA structure, some fields updated in S4 do not come to the CRM system. For example, BU_SORT1 and BU_SORT2 fields. When these fields are updated, there is no flow from S4 to CRM, but there is no such problem in other fields. Also, there is no such problem from CRM to S4. BUPA, which I tried, is an organization and a customer also exists in KNA structures. Can you help me with this?

entry.title: Re: Not able to rotate the line from Shapes
entry.content:
Hi Vish,

In the Styling panel, you can use the Rotate functionality once you have added the line shape. This will only allow either horizontal or vertical.

Cheers, Ivan.

entry.title: Re: Not able to rotate the line from Shapes
entry.content:
Hi Vish,

In the Styling panel, you can use the Rotate functionality once you have added the line shape. This will only allow either horizontal or vertical. This is in Optimised.

 

Cheers, Ivan.

entry.title: Batch management. But he has to enter it manually.

entry.title: Re: New Feature - Ability to Disable Welcome Emails
entry.content: It would nice to have this option at user profile level so it allows to choose the welcome email at user level and not system level. Like how it’s there in Ariba.

entry.title: Re: Authentication Failed in DpAgent
entry.content:
When you see the authentication error, there might be case that the user password is changed after setup DP agent connection with datasphere. In this case, you can request a new password in datasphere page and update the password in DP agent by following steps.

  1. At the command line, navigate to <DPAgent_root>/bin
  2. Execute one of the following commands using the --setSecureProperty parameter:
    On Windows, agentcli.bat --setSecureProperty
    On Linux, ./agentcli.sh --setSecureProperty
  3. If you want to use a different HANA User for Agent Messaging, choose Set HANA XS Username and enter the new username as prompted
  4. Choose Set HANA XS Password and enter the new password as prompted
  5. Restart the Data Provisioning Agent

There is also case that the hana db user is actually locked in the database, you can open through hana cockpit and see if the user is locked, then unlock that user, restart DP agent and check again.

Best regards
Helen

entry.title: Re: How Do I Copy Master Data Fields to a Sales Document?
entry.content:
Hi @CE6 ,

Thank you for the post. I do have a question about a requirement from customer. We need to capture customer's freight account information on the customer master and extend it to sales document and delivery document. 

Basically to create a custom field in the customer master and extend it to sales document and delivery, is this possible if so please give some insights on how to do this.

Thanks,

Brinda S
SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Re: Task 0 - Pre-requisite for August developer challenge - "ABAP Core Data Services"
entry.content: Task 0 Completed

entry.title: Re: Q)DM does not retrieve right Standard Value Key(SVK)'...
entry.content:
Hi Mike!

 

Thank you for comment.

Following the steps guided by the web site you send, I couldn't those menus and options in my cockpit or environment.

 

The given solution was...

  1. In the CPI package, manually deploy the new artifact called "API_STANDARD_VALUE_KEY_SRV". Otherwise, you will get this error messasge "action execute error: Unable to fetch the metadata: Failed to execute OData request" when downloading work center. For more information, see How to Update CPI Package and Deploy Artifacts.
  2. In Cloud Connector, add a new function "CO_MES_STANDARD_VALUE_KEY_PULL" as the accessible resource in the Access Control tab. For detailed steps, please see the "Configure Access Control" section in Setting up the Cloud Connector.

 

In my case...

    1. I cannot find 'CPI package' menu on my cockpit both of DMC and ERP Hana Cloud.

    2. Cloud Connector seems to be used for on-premise connection, but I don't use it. I feel some difficult.

 

In addition, one of the problems was solved. Parameter values in DM are now visible, though parameter names and disc. aren't, yet I don't know what was changed :D.

 

Best regards,

Wonpyo

entry.title: Re: No PO without PR
entry.content:
Dear @RashidKhan 

You may find the BAdI below

Change of Field Control for Purchase Order Item (MM_PUR_S4_PO_FLDCNTRL_SIMPLE)

With this BAdI, you can

Change the field control in purchase order apps by modifying the properties of specific fields on item level. These fields can be made hidden, read-only, mandatory, or optional.

Final Check before Saving Purchase Order (BD_MMPUR_FINAL_CHECK_PO)

With this BAdI, you can

Implement own checks before a purchase order is saved.

 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0e602d466b99490187fcbb30d1dc897c/8676e556cca85267e10000000a441470.html?locale=en-US

Thanks

entry.title: Re: For what stand the hrtt-service?
entry.content:
@rsnit thx for your suggestions, i try to follow it:

  1. 3230140 - How to find hrtt version in XS Advanced runtime 
  2. SAP HANA database explorer release notes SAP Note 237065

It seems with my (private P-user) account i'm not able to follow both links. Is there another way to get the information?

BTW, i have a S-user ID from my company, so i try to follow How do I login with my P-user/S-user ID instead of my email address?
But the provided Login-Form only accept E-Mail or Username. I remember there used to be an ID option too, like the the linked page above shows.

If this is a new topic, then let me know

entry.title: Re: What is Best strategy to migrate 107 Material documen...
entry.content:
Dear @PranavMahajan 

In the migration scope only movement type 561 is supported to post the initial balance, you may consider to use the API below to post goods movement type 107

https://api.sap.com/api/API_MATERIAL_DOCUMENT_SRV/overview

entry.title: Re: How configure and use external Tax Engine calculation in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
@wterceiro 

Estou configurando o SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public. Criei uma cópia da pricing SD Y14101 para atribuir algumas fórmulas e condições próprias.

Como eu faço para o mapear a nova pricing com as condições e valores da NF-e? No S/4HANA Private eu faço as configurações pela J1BTAX ou pela SPRO.

Financial accounting > Financial accounting configuration > VAT (IVA) > Global Settings > Brazil > Condition-based tax calculation > Assign SD tax values ​​to Invoice fields.

No CBC (Central busines configuration) existe o mapeamento das condições da NF-e somente para MM. Para SD não encontrei nada.

Obrigado!

entry.title: Using database events
entry.content:
Hi IQ Experts, 

I have an IQ stored procedure that collects data from iqmon monitoring views and stores this in an IQ table.

I want to execute this stored procedure every minute. I was planning to use an event (as in the CREATE EVENT statement) to collect this data. Most of the CREATE EVENT examples I see in the manuals are simple self-contained monitoring implementations.

Is there any issue with using database events for my use case?

Regards, KC

entry.title: SAP Work Zone Authorization control
entry.content:
Our project is implementing Work Zone and is including certain SuccessFactors applications in Work Zone as an app/tile (through deeplink urls). Can we check the following:

  1. Is it possible to expose the SuccessFactors role to Work Zone so we can use it to control the authorization of the app/tile in Work Zone?
  2. If option 1 is not possible and we have to create roles in Work Zone manually, how can we replicate and achieve the same level of control in Work Zone (like SuccessFactors):
    • We understand that in SuccessFactors, applications control can be further filtered based on the employment type/group. How do we adopt the same concept in Work Zone as we saw that it can only controlled at the role level?

entry.title: Re: Custom Field - SAP S4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

You can create a custom field with business context "Partner Sales Area Core View" which is available on sales area section of customer master data.

Regarding the drop down values, you can use type "Code List" when defining the custom field. 

Best regards,

Yong

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )

entry.title: Re: How to increase message processing log retention period from default 30 days in SAP CPI
entry.content: what happened next, is the log retention time extended?

entry.title: Re: The detailed production orders information of WIP ATY
entry.content: Hi Eva , thanks.

entry.title: Re: Couldn't choose user status profile in Create Technic...
entry.content:
The Technical Object User Status profile is related to the Functional Location Category in configuration. It is added here before a new Functional Location is created.
SPRO - Plant Maintenance>Technical Objects>Functional Locations>Define Functional Location Category

 

If it is Equipment this is the same it is related to the Equipment Category.
SPRO - Plant Maintenance>Technical Objects>Equipment>Assign User Status Profile to Equipment Category

entry.title: Re: Not able to rotate the line from Shapes
entry.content:
Looks like the option doesn't show up when you are creating on a 'Responsive' page. It appears for a 'Canvas' page in Optimised Design mode.

One thing you can do as a work around is create the line in a Canvas page, rotate it, then move it back to a Responsive page.

Looks like an SAP bug to me.

Cheers, Ivan.

entry.title: Re: EWM-Ware House Process Type
entry.content: Check if HU has warehouse process. It works only if HU has no process. If it was in standard 1010 you have copied it. You can remove it from your new process type and test again.

entry.title: Re: Access control on the pricing condition types
entry.content:
Hi,

I recommend exploring the use of extensibility in sales pricing "Requirement" at the pricing procedure step level. For detailed implementation guidance, refer to Custom Logic: Requirement | SAP Help Portal.

By leveraging this extension, you can achieve the business objective of setting certain condition types to be invalid under specific conditions through custom logic. This ensures that even if the sales representative accidentally selects an incorrect condition type, the system will invalidate it for the item.

Best Regards,
Fancy

entry.title: Re: Extensibility Approaches in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content: Excellent compilation 👍🏼

entry.title: Re: Notification on SAP PM
entry.content:
Create a Revision with no dates. They can be used as a bucket for reporting Notifications or Work Orders.

Transaction code IWR1 or the old code OIOB

entry.title: implement a custom application that can scan QR codes using SAP mobile start
entry.content:
Hi all,

In the Business Application Studio, I want to implement a custom sapui5 application that can scan QR codes with my mobile phone using SAP Mobile start. The application should be integrated into the Fiori Launchpad and work for both iOS and Android. It is important that not only simple barcodes are supported - QR codes are mandatory for my purposes. I would appreciate helpful links, instructions or step-by-step guides...

 

Thanks....

Regards
Anurag

entry.title: Re: SAC Lookup-Table - IF Statement
entry.content:
Hi,

Create a calculated dimension CD_Assignment(Measure based dimension)  and provide a measure values based on the condition , which you mentioned.  ( i.e. > 5 < 12 = Middle) and so on.

use these calculated dimension in the table.

use Article,Price,CD_Assignment  in the table.

Hope it helps.

regards

Giri

entry.title: Re: Enclose Table entries in a TR
entry.content:
Hi 

If you goal is to only transport the content of a Z-table. Easy way is:

Program ID = R3TR
Object Type = TABU
Object = <YOUR TABLE NAME>
Press key and enter they keys of the entries you need to transport. If it´s a client dependent table enter <client>* (i. eg 100*).

entry.title: EWAレポートはカスタマイズできますか
entry.content:
EWAレポートにおいて生成された内容をユーザ側で制御することは可能でしょうか。

意図的に、たとえば"ハードウェア能力"をEWAレポートから表示させないようにすることは可能ですか？

もしくは、EWAレポートで出力される内容は、ユーザの意図で編集することのできないものでしょうか。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: EWAレポートはカスタマイズできますか
entry.content:
ご担当者様

平素よりお世話になっております。

アーリーウォッチのレポート内容をお客様側よりカスタマイズすることはできません。

その点について、KBA 1829914 - Customize EWA Reports - SAP Solution Manager ➞Why can't the EWA reports be customizable? 

部分をご確認ください。

以上です。宜しくお願い致します。
SAPサポート
ショウセイ

entry.title: BAPI/FM To update field STCD1 in KNA1 for existing customer
entry.content:
Hello ,

Kindly help me with an BAPI or FM to update customer tax number1 (STCD1) in table KNA1 for an existing customer 

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Modernize your BW Landscape: SAP BW/4HANA and SAP Datasphere with SAP BW Bridge
entry.content: Does SAP suggest minimum two Datasphere tenancies for QA and Production Purposes? Any possible Architecture or maintenance complexities for using one tenancy for QA and Production? Azure can use a single tenancy with no issues. I appreciate if anyone assist. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: We have copied new company code in S/4 HANA public cloud
entry.content: Question forwarded to expert.

entry.title: Generative AI with SAP – Part 2: Components of SAP Business AI
entry.content:
This blog is part of the series Generative AI with SAP, which is focused on understanding how SAP is leveraging AI and generative AI across its portfolio.

In this series we are learning:

  • How SAP is leveraging AI and generative AI across it’s portfolio.
  • What SAP Business AI is and how SAP partners and customers can use it?
  • What is SAP AI Core? What is SAP AI launchpad? What is Joule? etc.
  • What role SAP BTP plays in SAP's AI strategy? ... and many more.

 

To make it easy to understand, the blog series is divided in small parts. Each blog requires maximum 10–15 minutes to learn.

 

  • Part 1 – Introduction to SAP Business AI 
  • Part 2 – Components of SAP Business AI [Current blog]
  • Part 3 – Joule, SAP’s Generative AI Copilot
  • Part 4 – AI Foundation on SAP BTP 
  • Part 5 – Introduction to SAP AI Core
  • Part 6 – Introduction to SAP AI launchpad
  • Part 7 – Get Started with SAP AI Core and SAP AI Launchpad
  • part 8 - Hello World using SAP AI Core
  • Part 9 – Overview of Generative AI Hub
  • Part 10 – SAP HANA Cloud vector engine
  • Part 11 - RAG, a real-life use case using SAP AI Core, Generative AI Hub and HANA Vector Engine

 

This is the 2nd blog in the series, where will learn what are major components of SAP Business AI.

Note: I will publish the subsequent  blogs soon.

 

Components of SAP Business AI

Major components of SAP Business AI are:

  • Joule
  • Embedded AI Applications
  • AI Foundation

Below image gives a high level overview of each component.

 

 

Now, let’s take a close look into these components.

 

Joule

Joule is:

  • An advanced, generative AI copilot
  • embedded throughout SAP’s cloud enterprise portfolio
  • To deliver proactive and contextualized insights from across the breadth and depth of SAP’s applications and third-party sources

Joule is designed to helps people get work done faster and drive better business outcomes in a secure, compliant way.

Below summarizes major points about Joule.

 

For more information on Joule, refer to Part 3 – Joule, SAP’s Generative AI Copilot

 

Embedded AI Capabilities

Under the umbrella of SAP Business AI, SAP is embedding the capabilities of AI across entire SAP solutions. These AI-powered capabilities include matching, intelligent business document processing, personalized recommendations, natural language processing, forecasting and predictions, and many more.

SAP is offering these embedded AI capabilities across all business areas including finance, supply chain, procurement, human resources, sales, marketing, and IT.

Here are some examples:

In Finance, SAP Cash Application allow customers to automate invoice matching. It automates and simplify the order-to-cash process in accounts receivable accounting.

In Supply Chain, SAP Integrated Business Planning for Supply Chain allow customers to predict demand reliably with AI-powered demand forecasting.

In Human Resources, Personalized Recommendation, one of the SAP AI Business Services embedded in SAP SuccessFactors enable customers to improve the employee experience at scale.

You may refer to this page to know more about how customers can benefit from AI built into the core business processes — connecting finance, supply chain, procurement, sales, marketing, human resources, and IT as shown in image below.

 

AI Foundation on SAP BTP

AI foundation on SAP BTP is a set of ready-to-use AI services and tools, which:

  • enable customers and partners
  • to create AI-powered extensions and applications
  • in a reliable, secure, and scalable way

 

Below image gives a high-level picture of AI foundation.

 

 Note: For more information on AI foundation, refer to Part 4 – AI Foundation on SAP BTP [to be published]

 

SAP’s Partnership with AI Vendors to Provide an Abstraction for SAP Customers

SAP has partnered with leading general-purpose AI vendors and large language model (LLM) providers to ensure that SAP customers are able to reap the benefit of AI innovations without going into individual contract with 3rd party vendors. SAP has made several strategic partnerships with Google, IBM, Nvidia, Microsoft and others.

For example:

SAP is leveraging Microsoft's Azure OpenAI Service to provide you access to powerful LLMs like GPT-3 without any 3rd party contract. From Generative AI Hub, you can access these large language models from multiple vendors easily.

SAP has partnered with NVIDIA to leverage its AI hardware and software solutions, for example NVIDIA V100 Tensor Core GPU can be used as one of the underlying infrastructures for SAP AI Core.  

 

Three Core Principles of SAP Business AI

SAP Business AI is built with three core principles: relevant, reliable, and responsible.

Relevant

In general, "relevant" means that AI systems should provide responses which are perfectly aligned with the user's current needs and context.

For example, if you ask an AI virtual assistant – “Find me a good restaurant to go now”, it should give the list of restaurants best on your specific food preferences and the current time. If it’s a dinner time, and the virtual assistant suggest a breakfast café OR if you are a vegetarian and it suggests a non-vegetarian restaurant, then it’s not Relevant for you.

Similarly, SAP Business AI understand the business context to become more relevant for customers and end users.

SAP Business AI is relevant from day one since it is built in across all SAP applications that customers already use to run their most critical business processes. These embedded AI capabilities are designed keeping business context in mind.

 

Reliable

In general, "reliable" refers to the consistency, accuracy, and dependability of the AI system in performing its tasks and producing the desired outcomes.

For example, a predictive AI model is considered reliable only if consistently predicts outcomes accurately, whether it's for stock prices, weather forecasting, or patient diagnoses. Or a chatbot is considered reliable only if understands user queries correctly and provides accurate and helpful responses consistently.

Reliability is one of the main core principles of SAP Business AI.

The services and solutions under SAP Business AI are built on rigorous product standards, and enterprise-readiness that customers expect from SAP. These AI applications are trained on industry and business process data, making it more reliable for customers.

Customers can trust the SAP Business AI to perform its intended function accurately, consistently, and dependably.

 

Responsible

In general, AI system being "responsible" refers to ensuring that AI systems are developed, deployed, and used in a manner that aligns with ethical principles, respects human rights, promotes fairness, and mitigates potential risks or harms.

SAP is deeply committed to AI ethics in line with our core values. SAP Business AI is designed for people to get their best work done, valuing human oversight and agency.

SAP system contains business critical and confidential data. SAP customers trust SAP with their mission-critical business processes and most sensitive data. Therefore, SAP AI applications and services are built using responsible AI. SAP uses a robust ethical framework that guides the development and operations of AI.

 

What’s Next?

Part 3 – Joule, SAP’s Generative AI Copilot

For more information, you may also refer to:

  • https://www.sap.com/india/products/artificial-intelligence.html
  • SAP Discovery Center Mission - Get Started with SAP Business AI
  • Join the SAP AI Services Community to stay updated.
  • SAP Business AI White Paper

 

Disclaimer – All the views and opinions in the blog are my own and is made in my personal capacity and that SAP shall not be responsible or liable for any of the contents published in this blog.

entry.title: SAP Datashere ビジネスコンテンツ概要とインストール手順
entry.content:
はじめに

こちらのブログではSAP Datasphereでご提供しているビジネスコンテンツの概要とインポート手順についてご紹介します。

ビジネスコンテンツとは

ビジネスコンテンツはSAPが無償で提供しているSAPデータソースとの連携を含む業務別、業界別のユースケースに対応した事前定義済みモデルのテンプレートです。

SAP Datasphereでご提供しているビジネスコンテンツにはテーブル、ビュー、ファクト、分析モデルなどの事前済みオブジェクトが含まれており、各コンテンツに含まれるオブジェクトやメジャー、KPI、データソースといった詳細情報はSAP Help Portalにて公開されております。

また、SAP DatasphereではSAPが作成したビジネスコンテンツだけでなくサードパーティーコンテンツとしてSAPパートナーが作成したビジネスコンテンツも提供しております。

モデリングレイヤー概要

ビジネスコンテンツに含まれるデータモデルの構成についてご紹介いたします。

ビジネスコンテンツはSAPのモデリングベストプラクティスに則って3つのレイヤーで構成されています。

SAP Datasphereのヘルプでは提供されているコンテンツ（ダッシュボード、ストーリー、モデル）の詳細を確認することができ、以下はFinance Foundation for SAP S/4HANA and S/4HANA Cloudの構成図です。

上記でご紹介した通りSAP Datasphereのビジネスコンテンツに含まれるテーブルやビュー、分析モデルなどが3つのレイヤーに分かれて構成されているのがご確認いただけます。また、テーブルやビューの技術名にはそれぞれのレイヤーの略語 (IL, HL, RL)より識別が可能となっています。

ビジネスコンテンツの探し方

ビジネスコンテンツはSAP Help Portalあるいはコミュニティページより探すことが可能です。

  • SAP Datasphere　オンラインヘルプ
  • SAP Datasphere ビジネスコンテンツ　コミュニティページ

ビジネスコンテンツのインポート

ビジネスコンテンツをインポートする前に特定のビジネス名と技術名で専用のスペースを作成する必要があります。

  • ビジネス名：SAP & Partner Content
  • 技術名：SAP_CONTEN

また、通貨換算テーブルの事前作成などが必要となる場合があり、それらの要件に関する情報はこちらのSAP Help Portalをご確認ください。

** コンテンツネットワークからコンテンツをインポートするには、DW 管理者グローバルロールを持つユーザ (または、範囲設定済みの DW スペース管理者ロールと、ライフサイクル権限を付与するグローバルロールの両方を持つユーザ) が必要となります。

SAP Datasphereのメニューよりセマンティックオンボーディングを選択し、コンテンツネットワーク以下からいずれかのタイルを選択します。

  • ビジネスコンテンツ: 業種および業務ライン向けに SAP が作成したエンドツーエンドのビジネスシナリオです。
  • サードパーティコンテンツ: SAP パートナが作成したエンドツーエンドのビジネスシナリオです。一部のサードパーティコンテンツは SAP Store で購入する必要があります。

本ブログではSAPが作成したコンテンツである「ビジネスコンテンツ」を選択します。

提供されているビジネスコンテンツの一覧が表示されます。

インポートするビジネスコンテンツを選択します。

以下は「Finance Foundation for SAP S/4HANA and S/4HANA Cloud」を選択した例です。

「概要」ページでは選択したビジネスコンテンツの概要を確認することが可能です。

また、スクロールダウンすると「How to install this package」という欄があり、こちらにはビジネスコンテンツに関する確認事項や、使用するデータソース、接続作成にあたって指定されている接続情報などが記載されているため、インポートの開始前に確認する必要があります。

「インポートオプション」ページではインポート時のオプションを選択します。

「上書き設定」ではシステム上のオブジェクトと同じ名前のオブジェクトがインポートに含まれている場合に既存のコンテンツを維持するのか、上書きするのかを選択します。

システムにまだ存在しないオブジェクトは常にインポートされます。「データの上書きのみ」あるいは「オブジェクトとデータを上書きする」のオプションを選択した場合、影響を受けるコンテンツのチェックが行われます。

右下の「インポート」を選択することでコンテンツのインポートジョブが開始され、「通知」よりインポートの実行状況の確認が可能です。

完了時やエラー発生時も通知からご確認いただくことが出来、インポートされたコンテンツは「SAP&Partner Content」スペースで確認が可能です。

既知の課題と制約

コンテンツネットワークで提供されているコンテンツの既知の課題と制約はこちらのSAP Help Portalを参照してください。

さいごに

最後までお読みいただきありがとうございます！

本ブログではSAP Datasphereのビジネスコンテンツの探し方とインストール手順をご紹介しました。

数多く提供されている業務および業種別の定義済みコンテンツを活用し、サンプルとして、あるいはテンプレートとして有効活用していただければと思います。

以下に参考としてSAP Help Portalのリンクを掲載しておりますので、併せてご確認ください

  • SAP および SAP パートナのビジネスコンテンツをコンテンツネットワークからインポート

  • SAP Datasphere Business Content

entry.title: Re: Para los que necesiten una consulta de facturas con los pagos SAP
entry.content:
Muchas gracias me sirvio muchisimo, comparto el query que hice a partir de este, llevo todo el dia con este y creao que ya tengo la informacion que necesito, yo lo trabajo en SAP Hana, solo me faltan unos datos como promedio de dias y suma de pagos por cliente, pero creo que esto ya me toca en Crystal.

de nuevo muchas gracias

SELECT DISTINCT T0."DocNum",T0."DocDate" as "Fecha Factura",
CASE
WHEN T4."GroupNum" = 3 THEN 15
WHEN T4."GroupNum" = 1 THEN 30
WHEN T4."GroupNum" = 2 THEN 45
WHEN T4."GroupNum" = 5 THEN 60
WHEN T4."GroupNum" = 6 THEN 75
WHEN T4."GroupNum" = 4 THEN 8
WHEN T4."GroupNum" = 7 THEN 90
WHEN T4."GroupNum" = -1 THEN 0
END AS "Plazo",
T0."CardName", T5."CityB",T0."DocTotal",
T3."DocNum" AS "N° Pago",T3."DocDate", DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DocDate", T3."DocDate") AS "Dias de Atraso"
FROM OINV T0
INNER JOIN OJDT T1 ON T0."TransId" = T1."TransId"
INNER JOIN ITR1 T2 ON T1."TransId"= T2."TransId"
INNER JOIN OCRD T4 ON T0."CardCode" = T4."CardCode"
INNER JOIN INV12 T5 ON T0."DocEntry" = T5."DocEntry"
INNER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT TA."DocNum",TA."DocDate", TC."TransId", TC."ReconNum"

FROM ORCT TA
INNER JOIN OJDT TB ON TA."TransId" = TB."TransId"
INNER JOIN ITR1 TC ON TB."TransId" = TC."TransId"
) T3 ON T2."ReconNum" = T3."ReconNum"

entry.title: SAP provided official document type list
entry.content: Does SAP provides any official document for list of purchasing document's document type (Eg for standard purchase order its NB)? Are there any links which I can refer to? Or if possible can anyone provide me the list of document types for purchasing documents from SAP. The list should be from official SAP. Need it ASAP. Please assist.
